vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #733

plan.title: fix(.github/workflows/release.yml): release job auto-flips draft to public, bypassing #716 / Phase 5 user-only authority gate

narratives.Description: fix(.github/workflows/release.yml): release job auto-flips draft to public, bypassing #716 / Phase 5 user-only authority gate

narrative.Action: Identify and remove the offending step in `.github/workflows/release.yml` that flips `isDraft` from true to false (likely `softprops/action-gh-release@vN` with `draft: false` or unset, or `gh release edit --draft=false`). Workflow's job becomes BUILD AND UPLOAD only. Publish authority belongs exclusively to `task release:publish`. Path (1) per issue #733 — preferred over the workflow_dispatch input alternative because it preserves the #716 safety contract with no new moving parts.
narrative.Acceptance: After this fix, running `task release -- <new-version>` followed by waiting for release.yml to complete leaves the release in `isDraft: true` state. `task release:publish -- <new-version>` is the only path that flips draft -> public. Verified by reading `gh release view v<new-version> --json isDraft,publishedAt` post-workflow-completion: returns `{isDraft: true, publishedAt: null}`.

items.title: New test asserts the workflow does not auto-publish

narrative.Action: Add `tests/content/test_release_workflow.py` (or similar location matching project conventions) that parses `.github/workflows/release.yml` as YAML and asserts: no step uses `softprops/action-gh-release@v*` with `draft: false` or `draft` unset (default is false), no step uses `gh release edit --draft=false` directly, no step otherwise flips the draft flag.
narrative.Acceptance: Test fails on the pre-fix workflow YAML (regression-protection demonstration); test passes on the post-fix workflow YAML. Test runs as part of `task check`.

narrative.Action: Add a single `### Fixed` line under `[Unreleased]` describing the auto-publish-bypass fix and citing #716 (the safety contract) and #733 (this issue).
narrative.Acceptance: `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` section has the new line. PR template checklist item satisfied.

references.title: Issue #733: fix(.github/workflows/release.yml): release job auto-flips draft to public, bypassing #716 / Phase 5 user-only authority gate
